title: Rowd Hoi Aaha Na
desc: A love story turns chaotic when rivalry and rebellion intertwine, creating a thrilling drama of emotions, misunderstandings, and redemption amid action-packed twists.

title: Ramdhenu
desc: Mitali wants her son Gogol in a good school, but he fails the test. She and her husband Laltu seek help, even from a coach, to get Gogol admitted. Will they succeed, or see what truly makes him happy?

title: Surujmukhi
desc: A journey of resilience and hope as Surujmukhi blooms against odds.

title: Alaka Ragini
desc: A melodious cultural show highlighting traditional music, poetic expressions, and emotional performances that connect hearts across generations.

title: Adi Anadi
desc: Nandu and Geethika get married after Nandu works in Saudi. After the ceremony, a fight breaks out with two men on a bike during their return.
